requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness and IEC 61000 EMC Evidence

summary.en: Angola does not appear to have a public national OCPP mandate for EV chargers, but networked public or fleet chargers are likely to require charge-point management, remote monitoring, billing, load management, and fault reporting through the project owner's back office. In IEC-aligned charger projects, OCPP is the common interoperability baseline. EMC evidence should be prepared against the IEC 61000 family and project-specified limits, including emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, surge, and power-quality data needed by ENDE or the site electrical engineer.
summary.zh: 安哥拉尚未显示出公开的全国性OCPP充电桩强制要求，但联网公共或车队充电桩通常会需要通过项目业主后台进行充电点管理、远程监控、计费、负载管理和故障报告。在IEC体系充电项目中，OCPP是常见互操作基线。EMC证据应按IEC 61000体系及项目规定限值准备，包括ENDE或场址电气工程师所需的发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪变、浪涌和电能质量数据。
summary.zht: 安哥拉尚未顯示出公開的全國性OCPP充電樁強制要求，但聯網公共或車隊充電樁通常會需要通過項目業主後台進行充電點管理、遠程監控、計費、負載管理和故障報告。在IEC體系充電項目中，OCPP是常見互操作基線。EMC證據應按IEC 61000體系及項目規定限值準備，包括ENDE或場址電氣工程師所需的發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃變、浪湧和電能質量數據。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required for CCS2 DC communication
ENDE project power-quality and connection review where applicable

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. GB/T 27930 is not an OCPP back-office protocol and is not the CCS2 communication stack. China chargers may also use operator-specific platform protocols; those implementations need separate confirmation for Angola project back-office integration and cybersecurity expectations.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信协议。GB/T 27930不是OCPP后台协议，也不是CCS2通信栈。中国充电桩还可能采用运营商专有平台协议；这些实现需要针对安哥拉项目后台集成和网络安全预期另行确认。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。GB/T 27930不是OCPP後台協議，也不是CCS2通訊棧。中國充電樁還可能採用運營商專有平台協議；這些實現需要針對安哥拉項目後台集成和網絡安全預期另行確認。

standards_or_laws: China EMC test reports where available

gap.en: Exporters should confirm: (1) whether the Angola project requires OCPP 1.6J, OCPP 2.0.1, or another protocol; (2) back-office API, SIM, payment, metering, and remote update requirements; (3) CCS2 communication stack requirements for DC chargers; (4) IEC 61000 and IEC 61851-21-2 EMC reports; (5) harmonic and surge data acceptable to ENDE or the site engineer. GB/T 27930 alone does not provide OCPP network interoperability.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认：(1) 安哥拉项目是否要求OCPP 1.6J、OCPP 2.0.1或其他协议；(2) 后台API、SIM、支付、计量和远程升级要求；(3) 直流充电桩CCS2通信栈要求；(4) IEC 61000和IEC 61851-21-2 EMC报告；(5) ENDE或场址工程师可接受的谐波和浪涌数据。仅有GB/T 27930不能提供OCPP网络互操作。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認：(1) 安哥拉項目是否要求OCPP 1.6J、OCPP 2.0.1或其他協議；(2) 後台API、SIM、支付、計量和遠程升級要求；(3) 直流充電樁CCS2通訊棧要求；(4) IEC 61000和IEC 61851-21-2 EMC報告；(5) ENDE或場址工程師可接受的諧波和浪湧數據。僅有GB/T 27930不能提供OCPP網絡互操作。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is mandatory where required by the charge-point operator, fleet owner, payment platform, tender, or site activation process; IEC EMC evidence is project-critical for grid-connected equipment and may be required by importer, IANORQ, ENDE, or the site engineer
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not an OCPP back-office substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP and EMC should be treated as separate Angola project checks. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no accepted OCPP implementation will not be ready for networked public or fleet charging projects that require back-office interoperability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP和EMC应作为安哥拉项目中的两个独立检查项处理。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无被接受OCPP实现的充电桩，不适用于要求后台互操作的联网公共或车队充电项目。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP和EMC應作為安哥拉項目中的兩個獨立檢查項處理。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無被接受OCPP實現的充電樁，不適用於要求後台互操作的聯網公共或車隊充電項目。
